evals.expected_outcome: Claude reads the spec, invokes /triage:grade (graded hard for a cross-cutting auth change), drafts a 4-8 task plan, stress-tests via /codex:reason, verifies callsite coverage via /agy:longctx (multi-file change), writes the plan artifact.

assertions.name: codex_reason_stress_test
assertions.description: codex:reason is invoked to stress-test the plan for missed edges (medium+ graded plan)

assertions.name: agy_longctx_coverage
assertions.description: agy:longctx is invoked to verify callsite coverage (multi-file change)

assertions.name: task_count_reasonable
assertions.description: plan has 3-8 atomic tasks, each naming files + verification

evals.prompt: Plan the typo fix to README.md line 42
evals.expected_outcome: Claude grades low, skips Steps 3 and 4 (over-investment for a trivial change), writes a tiny plan with one task.

assertions.name: no_codex_reason
assertions.description: codex:reason is NOT invoked for a low-difficulty change

assertions.name: no_agy_longctx
assertions.description: agy:longctx is NOT invoked for a single-line change
